character_cards.canonical_visual_summary: Tall rain-worn swordsman in a tattered dark travel coat with a chipped katana and cracked sword guard.
character_cards.color_notes_even_for_bw: Dark coat mass, pale rain highlights, chipped blade glints.
continuity_rules: Ren stands between Mio and threats.
Ren grips the sword only when danger is real.
character_cards.current_story_state: Reluctant protector beginning to care for Mio.
character_cards.eye_anchor_description: Dark, guarded eyes with heavy lower lids.
character_cards.eye_description: Dark, watchful eyes with heavy lower lids.
character_cards.face_anchor_description: Long tired face with a thin brow scar and narrow watchful eyes.
character_cards.face_description: Long tired face, narrow eyes, faint scar through one brow.
forbidden_changes: Do not make Ren cheerful or ornate.
Do not remove the cracked sword guard.
character_cards.injury_state: Old scars only; no fresh injury in the demo.
character_cards.name: Ren Aki
character_cards.outfit_anchor_description: Tattered dark travel coat over layered kimono; cracked sword guard always visible.
character_cards.outfit_default: Tattered dark travel coat over layered kimono, cracked sword guard.
character_cards.personality: Reserved, vigilant, self-punishing, protective when it matters.
character_cards.scars_marks: Thin brow scar and old cuts on sword hand.

character_cards.body_anchor_description: Small childlike ghost silhouette with translucent edges.
character_cards.canonical_visual_summary: Small ghost child in a pale kimono, hovering above wet ground while holding a handmade paper lantern.
character_cards.color_notes_even_for_bw: Pale silhouette, translucent edge treatment, warm lantern-white highlight.
continuity_rules: Mio floats slightly above wet ground.
character_cards.current_story_state: Trusting Ren while still afraid of the ash spirits.
character_cards.eye_anchor_description: Large reflective eyes with tiny lantern highlights.
character_cards.eye_description: Large reflective eyes with tiny lantern highlights.
character_cards.face_anchor_description: Round small face with calm, distant eyes.
character_cards.face_description: Round small face with calm, distant eyes.
forbidden_changes: Do not give Mio a shadow.
Do not make the lantern look electric.
character_cards.hair_anchor_description: Short pale bob that floats slightly at the ends.
character_cards.hair_description: Short pale bob that floats slightly at the ends.
character_cards.injury_state: No physical injury; ghostly translucence only.
character_cards.name: Mio
character_cards.outfit_anchor_description: Simple pale kimono and bare feet hovering just above ground.
character_cards.outfit_default: Simple pale kimono, bare feet hovering just above ground.
character_cards.personality: Quiet, observant, gentle, braver than she looks.

characters.description: A quiet wanderer with a broken sword guard and a habit of standing between danger and anyone smaller than him.
characters.name: Ren Aki
characters.visual_notes: Long travel coat, chipped katana, tired eyes, rain-dark hair.

characters.description: A silent child spirit carrying a paper lantern that keeps the ruined city from going fully dark.
characters.name: Mio
characters.visual_notes: Small kimono, bare feet above the ground, translucent edges, lantern held close.
